en: Now after the Sabbath, toward the dawn of the first day of the week, Mary Magdalene and the other Mary went to see the tomb.
zh: 過了安息日，在禮拜日天亮的時候，抹大拉的馬利亞和另一個馬利亞來看墳墓。

en: And behold, there was a great earthquake, for an angel of the Lord descended from heaven and came and rolled back the stone and sat on it.
zh: 忽然，地震得很厲害；主的使者從天上下來，把石頭輥開，坐在上面。

en: His appearance was like lightning, and his clothing white as snow.
zh: 他的樣子好像閃電，衣服潔白如雪。

en: And for fear of him the guards trembled and became like dead men.
zh: 看守的人因為害怕他，就渾身戰抖，好像死了一樣。

en: But the angel said to the women, "Do not be afraid, for I know that you seek Jesus who was crucified.
zh: 那使者對婦女們說：“你們不要怕，我知道你們在找被釘十字架的耶穌。

en: He is not here, for he has risen, as he said. Come, see the place where he lay.
zh: 他不在這裡，已經照他所說的復活了。你們來看安放他的地方吧。

en: Then go quickly and tell his disciples that he has risen from the dead, and behold, he is going before you to Galilee; there you will see him. See, I have told you."
zh: 快去告訴他的門徒：‘他已經從死人中復活了。他會比你們先到加利利去，你們在那裡必看見他。’現在我已經告訴你們了。”

en: So they departed quickly from the tomb with fear and great joy, and ran to tell his disciples.
zh: 她們立刻離開墳墓，又害怕，又十分歡喜，跑去告訴耶穌的門徒。

en: And behold, Jesus met them and said, "Greetings!" And they came up and took hold of his feet and worshiped him.
zh: 忽然，耶穌向她們迎面而來，說：“你們好。”她們就上前，抱住他的腳拜他。

en: Then Jesus said to them, "Do not be afraid; go and tell my brothers to go to Galilee, and there they will see me."
zh: 耶穌對她們說：“不要怕，去告訴我的弟兄，叫他們到加利利去，他們在那裡必看見我。”

en: While they were going, behold, some of the guard went into the city and told the chief priests all that had taken place.
zh: 她們去的時候，有些衛兵進了城，把一切所發生的事向祭司長報告。

en: And when they had assembled with the elders and taken counsel, they gave a sufficient sum of money to the soldiers
zh: 祭司長就和長老聚集在一起商量，然後拿許多錢給士兵，

en: and said, "Tell people, 'His disciples came by night and stole him away while we were asleep.'
zh: 說：“你們要這樣說：‘他的門徒晚上來了，趁我們睡著的時候，把他偷走了。’

en: And if this comes to the governor's ears, we will satisfy him and keep you out of trouble."
zh: 如果總督知道了這件事，我們會說服他，不會牽連你們。”

en: So they took the money and did as they were directed. And this story has been spread among the Jews to this day.
zh: 士兵收了錢，就照著祭司長和長老的指使去作。這種說法直到今日還流傳在猶太人當中。

en: Now the eleven disciples went to Galilee, to the mountain to which Jesus had directed them.
zh: 十一個門徒往加利利去，到了耶穌指定的山上。

en: And when they saw him they worshiped him, but some doubted.
zh: 他們看見耶穌就拜他，但仍然有些人懷疑。

en: And Jesus came and said to them, "All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me.
zh: 耶穌上前來，對他們說：“天上地上一切權柄都賜給我了。

en: Go therefore and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit,
zh: 所以，你們要去使萬民作我的門徒，奉父子聖靈的名，給他們施洗 ，

en: teaching them to observe all that I have commanded you. And behold, I am with you always, to the end of the age."
zh: 我吩咐你們的一切，都要教導他們遵守。這樣，我就常常與你們同在，直到這世代的終結。”
